geographic_restrictions: Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada (specifically within the Exchange District National Historic Site)
project_area: heritage conservation, mixed-use development, urban revitalization, sustainable community development, educational facility redevelopment
demographic_requirements: Projects must contribute to the socio-cultural and economic sustainability of the Exchange District, including support for student housing, culinary arts education, and public amenities.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include educational institutions (e.g., Red River College), non-profits, municipal governments, and private sector entities. Projects must focus on heritage conservation, adaptive reuse of historic buildings, and mixed-use development within the Exchange District National Historic Site in Winnipeg. Priority is given to initiatives that promote sustainable community development, educational opportunities, and public engagement.
